# Generated — do not edit

The files in this directory (`kpxc-agent`, `lib/`) are **auto-synced copies** of the
canonical tool at the repository root. They exist so the `keepassxc-secrets` skill is
self-contained when imported by a skill marketplace.

Do not edit them here — your changes will be overwritten. Edit the canonical files at the
repo root (`/kpxc-agent`, `/lib/`); the `.github/workflows/sync-skill-tool.yml` workflow
regenerates this bundle on the next push to `main`.
